idea-plugin.name: FactoryLine
idea-plugin.description:
Run local FactoryLine gates and inspect receipts without leaving your IDE.

  • Run explicit assembly and receipt-verification commands.
  • Inspect changed-proof risk and the latest local receipt.
  • Open a read-only local time and token meter.
  • Open the loopback-only Factory Studio target compiler.
  • Compile PRDs into supervised, passport-bound Product Missions.
  • Operate durable mission graphs and route secret-free BYOK policies for JetBrains.
  • Require workspace confirmation before any command executes.

The plugin never uploads project files or receipts, signs artifacts, or decides whether a release is ready.

Documentation and source
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Add loopback-only Factory Studio with explicit workspace confirmation.
  • Add Product Missions for deterministic PRD-to-value-slice planning.
  • Recognize only literal 127.0.0.1 Studio URLs and open them through the JetBrains browser API.
  • Local meter overview with measured-time and module-reported token boundaries.
  • Retain local assembly, receipt verification, proof-risk, and receipt-view actions.
  • Add guarded mission status, history, verification, Mermaid export, event recording, and BYOK routing.

action.description: Run FactoryLine assembly for a feature
Verify FactoryLine receipts for a feature
Show the newest local FactoryLine receipt
Show the local FactoryLine time and token meter
Start the loopback-only governed target builder
Compile a PRD into supervised, passport-bound value missions
Operate durable mission graphs and route a secret-free BYOK policy
Show FactoryLine receipt invalidation caused by current changes
Show signature presence without claiming identity verification
